results.title: WATCH: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth's Bench Press Struggle Goes Viral During Workout With Soldiers at Guantanamo Bay
results.description: The footage quickly gained traction online, with many users commenting on the apparent difficulty Hegseth faced while lifting the weight. In the video, a visibly sweaty Hegseth appears to require assistance from a soldier standing behind him as a spotter, leading to intense discussion across social media platforms. The post WATCH: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth's Bench Press Struggle Goes Viral During Workout With Soldiers at Guantanamo Bay appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: Odisha Governor Haribabu Kambhampati reviews Puri Railway Station redevelopment work, watch
results.description: Puri: Odisha Governor Haribabu Kambhampati on Saturday reviewed the ongoing redevelopment work at Puri Railway Station. The Governor assessed the progress of the new terminal construction being undertaken by the Railways Department. With passenger footfall to Puri steadily rising, the station is being modernised to provide enhanced facilities for travellers. results.title: A Judge Calls It Censorship and Orders Trump’s Officials to Restore What They Stripped From the National Parks
results.description: A federal judge has ordered Donald Trump's administration to restore the signs and exhibits about slavery, climate change and Native Americans it stripped from national parks under an order targeting material that cast the country in a negative light. Calling the purge censorship, the judge gave officials three weeks to put the history back.

results.title: Abrar Qazi Discusses New Show and Social Issues Ahead of Premiere
results.description: Abrar Qazi is gearing up for the launch of his new show 'Tu Hi Re Dil Mein' on Zee TV. In an exclusive interview, he addressed the recent Rs 370 biryani controversy involving comedian Pranit More, emphasizing the importance of respect for women. Abrar also shared his views on relationship red and green flags, advocating for equality and empathy. As excitement builds for his show, Abrar's powerful messages resonate with the youth, urging them to foster a culture of dignity and respect.

results.title: Peddler detained, another’s property attached in Kathua; cannabis destroyed in Doda
results.description: JAMMU: A drug peddler was booked under the PIT-NDPS Act, while a house and a goods carrier belonging to another were attached in Jammu and Kashmir’s Kathua district on Saturday, police said. Separately, police arrested two drug peddlers along with narcotics and cash in Kathua and Jammu districts and destroyed wild cannabis spread over five [...]
